# Strategic Advisers

> Strategic Advisers is a digital advertising, public relations, public affairs, and media strategy firm helping organizations reach targeted audiences and drive measurable results.

## About

Strategic Advisers was founded by award-winning journalists and today operates as a digital-first communications firm offering digital advertising, media strategy, public relations, public affairs, content, and campaign measurement. Services are delivered independently or as part of an integrated campaign spanning paid, earned, and owned media. The firm works with organizations that have complex audiences, competitive markets, long sales cycles, public-facing challenges, or high expectations for measurable results.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://saprdigital.com/): Firm overview, summary of the four core service areas, industries served, and differentiators.
- [Services](https://saprdigital.com/services): Five service areas, each with a description and a list of included capabilities.
- [Industries](https://saprdigital.com/industries): Eleven industries served, each with a description and the relevant services.
- [About](https://saprdigital.com/about): Firm history, approach and differentiators, and partner profiles.
- [Contact](https://saprdigital.com/contact): Contact form for inquiries.

## Services

- [Digital Advertising](https://saprdigital.com/services#digital-advertising): Programmatic display, Google Search and PPC, paid social, CTV and OTT, streaming audio, geofencing, retargeting, CRM and customer list targeting, landing page strategy, campaign reporting and optimization.
- [Media Strategy & Traditional Buying](https://saprdigital.com/services#media-strategy): Billboard and digital out-of-home, radio, broadcast and cable television, print, sponsorships, media planning, media placement coordination, integrated digital and traditional campaigns.
- [Public Relations](https://saprdigital.com/services#public-relations): Media relations, crisis communications, reputation management, executive visibility, community relations, content strategy, message development, press releases and announcements.
- [Public Affairs](https://saprdigital.com/services#public-affairs): Issue advocacy, public awareness campaigns, stakeholder communications, community engagement, grassroots campaigns, coalition building, government and community relations, message development.
- [Strategy, Measurement and Optimization](https://saprdigital.com/services#strategy): Audience research, competitive research, campaign planning, channel strategy, budget recommendations, performance reporting, ongoing optimization, strategic recommendations.

## Industries

Listed on [Industries](https://saprdigital.com/industries):

- Higher Education: Awareness, inquiries, enrollment support, and academic program promotion.
- Manufacturing & Industrial: Complex product communication, distributor and customer reach, recruitment, market visibility.
- E-Commerce & Consumer Brands: Product awareness, customer acquisition, retargeting, promotions, sales attribution.
- Healthcare & Nonprofits: Audience education, awareness, fundraising, participant recruitment, sensitive communications.
- Financial Institutions: Product promotion, trust building, customer reach, community visibility.
- Public Sector & Advocacy: Issue explanation, awareness, stakeholder engagement, public support.
- Housing & Community Development: Opportunity promotion, resident reach, inquiry generation, local awareness.
- Regional & Multi-Location Businesses: Market awareness, per-location promotion, brand consistency.
- Government & Municipalities: Resident communication, program and service awareness, public issues, community engagement.
- Energy & Utilities: Program explanation, initiative promotion, ratepayer and stakeholder communication.
- Emerging & Specialized Industries: New category introduction, credibility building, niche audience reach.

## Leadership

Listed on [About](https://saprdigital.com/about):

- Greg Greene, Partner: Business operations, project management, and relationship management for the firm's largest clients. Previously 15+ years in finance, primarily with Fifth Third Bank.
- Madison Walton-Smith, Partner: Founder of Strategic Advisers Digital; leads digital advertising and strategic communications strategy. Previously an early employee at The Trade Desk. Serves on the Google Ads Advisory Council.
